text: Request Enterprise API access from your PropertyFinder account manager.
PropertyFinder will provide your unique API Key (Client ID) and API Secret (Client Secret).
After updating the .env file, restart the Flask server to load the new credentials.

The PropertyFinder Enterprise API uses OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials flow. Your API Key and Secret are used to obtain a short-lived JWT access token (valid for 30 minutes). The application automatically refreshes the token when needed.
Your credentials are stored locally in the .env file
Tokens are automatically refreshed when expired

Must be a valid Location ID from the PropertyFinder Locations API
The Public Profile ID of the agent (from Users API)
Required for Dubai (RERA) and Abu Dhabi (ADREC)
URLs must be publicly accessible for at least 1 hour
Use full names like "apartment", "villa", not codes
• Use UTF-8 encoding for Arabic text
• Use API property types (apartment, villa, etc.)
• Include at least one image URL
• Use consistent formatting for all rows
• Use "Custom Value" for same agent on all listings
• Image URLs must be publicly accessible for 1+ hour
• Don't include currency symbols in price (just numbers)
• Don't use commas in numbers (2500000 not 2,500,000)
• Don't use special characters in reference
• Don't include HTML or emojis in title/description
Select "Custom Value" for assigned_agent and enter the email once
Separate multiple image URLs with commas or pipes (|)
Use exact values like "balcony, central-ac" - no spaces in names
Optional - leave empty to auto-generate unique references (LM-YYYYMMDD-XXXXX)
Check the preview table before submitting to catch errors early

(user.firstName || '') + ' ' + (user.lastName || '') : ''; }, getLeadsCount(listing) { const listingId = String(listing.id || listing.reference || ''); if (!listingId) return 0; return this.leads.filter(lead => { const leadListingId = String(lead.listing?.id || lead.listing?.reference || lead.listingId || ''); return leadListingId === listingId; }).length; }, // Column visibility management toggleColumn(key) { const idx = this.visibleColumns.indexOf(key); if (idx > -1) { this.visibleColumns.splice(idx, 1); } else { this.visibleColumns.push(key); } localStorage.setItem('insights_visible_columns', JSON.stringify(this.visibleColumns)); }, resetColumns() { // Note: clicks/impressions not shown by default - data not available from PF API this.visibleColumns = ['reference', 'type', 'bedrooms', 'location', 'exposure', 'publishedAt', 'qualityScore', 'price', 'status', 'leads']; localStorage.setItem('insights_visible_columns', JSON.stringify(this.visibleColumns)); }, // Get exposure/boost type from products object getExposureType(listing) { // Check for Spotlight first (CTS priority 100) if (listing.ctsPriority === 100 || listing.spotlight || listing.spotlightStatus === 'spotlight') { return 'Spotlight'; } const products = listing.products; if (products) { // Check for featured/premium/standard objects with data if (products.featured && (products.featured.id || products.featured.createdAt)) { return 'Featured'; } if (products.premium && (products.premium.id || products.premium.createdAt)) { return 'Premium'; } if (products.standard && (products.standard.id || products.standard.createdAt)) { return 'Standard'; } // Fallback for different structures if (typeof products === 'object' && !Array.isArray(products)) { if (products.type) return products.type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + products.type.slice(1); if (products.name) return products.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + products.name.slice(1); } if (Array.isArray(products) && products.length > 0) { const hasFeature = products.some(p => p.type === 'featured' || p.name === 'featured'); const hasPremium = products.some(p => p.type === 'premium' || p.name === 'premium'); if (hasFeature) return 'Featured'; if (hasPremium) return 'Premium'; } } // Fallback for direct flags if (listing.featured) return 'Featured'; if (listing.premium) return 'Premium'; return 'Standard'; }, getExposureClass(listing) { const type = this.getExposureType(listing); switch(type) { case 'Spotlight': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800'; case 'Featured': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'; case 'Premium': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800'; default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'; } }, // Get published date from portals.propertyfinder.publishedAt getPublishedAt(listing, full = false) { const publishedAt = listing.portals?.propertyfinder?.publishedAt || listing.publishedAt || listing.published_at; if (!publishedAt) return '-'; const date = new Date(publishedAt); const locale = (window.I18N && window.I18N.lang === 'ar') ? 'ar-AE-u-nu-latn' : 'en-GB'; if (full) { return date.toLocaleString(locale); } // Short format: DD/MM HH:MM return date.toLocaleDateString(locale, { day: '2-digit', month: '2-digit' }) + ' ' + date.toLocaleTimeString(locale, { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }); }, // Get impressions from statistics getImpressions(listing) { return listing.statistics?.impressions || listing.impressions || 0; }, // Get clicks from statistics getClicks(listing) { return listing.statistics?.clicks || listing.clicks || 0; }, getTotalLeadsForListings() { let total = 0; const listingIds = new Set(this.filteredListings.map(l => String(l.id || l.reference || ''))); this.leads.forEach(lead => { const leadListingId = String(lead.listing?.id || lead.listing?.reference || lead.listingId || ''); if (listingIds.has(leadListingId)) { total++; } }); return total; }, formatNumber(val) { if (val === null || val === undefined) return '-'; const locale = (window.I18N && window.I18N.lang === 'ar') ? 'ar-AE-u-nu-latn' : 'en-AE'; return Number(val).toLocaleString(locale); }, getCacheAge() { if (!this.cachedAt) return 'unknown'; const age = Math.round((Date.now() - new Date(this.cachedAt).getTime()) / 1000); if (age

Copied: ' + text; document.body.appendChild(toast); setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 2000); }, calculateStats() { const listings = this.filteredListings; this.stats.total = listings.length; // Count by status (PF API uses state.type) this.stats.live = listings.filter(l => l.state?.type === 'live' || l.status === 'live' || l.status === 'published' ).length; this.stats.draft = listings.filter(l => l.state?.type === 'draft' || l.status === 'draft' ).length; this.stats.takendown = listings.filter(l => l.state?.type === 'takendown' || l.status === 'takendown' ).length; this.stats.livePercent = this.stats.total > 0 ? Math.round((this.stats.live / this.stats.total) * 100) : 0; // Calculate total leads for current filtered listings this.stats.totalLeads = this.getTotalLeadsForListings(); // Conversion rate: leads per listing this.stats.conversionRate = this.stats.live > 0 ? (this.stats.totalLeads / this.stats.live).toFixed(2) : 0; // Average quality score let totalQuality = 0; let qualityCount = 0; listings.forEach(l => { const quality = l.qualityScore?.value || 0; if (quality > 0) { totalQuality += quality; qualityCount++; } }); this.stats.avgQuality = qualityCount > 0 ? Math.round(totalQuality / qualityCount) : 0; // Total impressions and clicks let totalImpressions = 0; let totalClicks = 0; listings.forEach(l => { totalImpressions += l.statistics?.impressions ?? l.impressions ?? 0; totalClicks += l.statistics?.clicks ?? l.clicks ?? 0; }); this.stats.totalImpressions = totalImpressions; this.stats.totalClicks = totalClicks; // Average CTR this.stats.avgCTR = totalImpressions > 0 ? ((totalClicks / totalImpressions) * 100).toFixed(2) : 0; // Total credits spent let totalCredits = 0; listings.forEach(l => { totalCredits += l.credits?.spent ?? l.creditsSpent ?? 0; }); this.stats.totalCredits = totalCredits; this.stats.avgCredits = this.stats.total > 0 ?
